texts.orig: FROM THE PRINCIPAL'S DESK FROM THE PRINCIPAL'S DESK
texts.text: FROM THE PRINCIPAL'S DESK FROM THE PRINCIPAL'S DESK

texts.label: text
texts.orig: I  am very pleased to see that the most of  academic  activities  are  right  back  in  the track.  The  teaching  learning  activities  have resumed in full swing. The family of WP is taking  part  in  many  activities  as  before. Hope,  in  near  future  we  will  forget  about  the scars  of  the  global  pandemic  and  engage ourselves in our works with full dedication.  I thank the team of our institute Newsletter for their works to bring out the Issue in time. I  am very pleased to see that the most of  academic  activities  are  right  back  in  the track.  The  teaching  learning  activities  have resumed in full swing. The family of WP is taking  part  in  many  activities  as  before.  I Hope,  in  near  future  we  will  forget  about  the scars  of  the  global  pandemic  and  engage ourselves in our works with full dedication.  I thank the team of our institute Newsletter for their works to bring out the Issue in time.
